ast.target: 警告：upload() 已弃用，请使用 uploadFrom()。

ast.target: 警告：append() 已弃用，请使用 appendFrom()。

ast.name: log

ast.target: 警告：download() 已弃用，请使用 downloadTo()。

ast.name: log
ast.source: Warning: uploadDir() has been deprecated, use uploadFromDir().
ast.target: 警告：uploadDir() 已弃用，请使用 uploadFromDir()。

ast.name: log

ast.target: 警告：downloadDir() 已弃用，请使用 downloadToDir()。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Quietly sync your notes at regular intervals.
ast.target: 定期静默同步您的笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This is an experimental feature. Media uploads are not supported. To protect your data, KeepSidian attempts to archive conflicting Google Keep notes, and only downloads to the 'save location' specified in the settings above. As always, please remember to back up your vault.
ast.target: 这是一项实验性功能。不支持媒体上传。为保护您的数据，KeepSidian 会尝试归档冲突的 Google Keep 笔记，并且仅下载到上方设置中指定的“保存位置”。一如既往，请记得备份您的保险库。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: I've reviewed the info above and the backup guide. Let's proceed.
ast.target: 我已查看以上信息和备份指南。让我们继续。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Support the development of KeepSidian and get access to the features below, priority support and early access to new features.
ast.target: 支持 KeepSidian 的开发，并获取以下功能、优先支持以及新功能的早期访问权限。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Recheck your status and unlock supporter settings if billing is active.
ast.target: 重新检查您的状态，如果计费有效，则解锁支持者设置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Thank you for your support! Access supporter-exclusive settings below.
ast.target: 感谢您的支持！请在下方访问支持者专属设置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 您的 Google Keep 电子邮箱。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folder path pattern for imported notes. Variables: {now.*} or {note.*} for date, time, year, month, day, quarter. Examples: {now.date} OR {note.year} OR /KeepSidian/{now.year}/{note.month}-{note.day} OR /path/to/daily notes
ast.target: 导入笔记的文件夹路径模式。变量：{now.*} 或 {note.*} 用于日期、时间、年、月、日、季度。示例：{now.date} 或 {note.year} 或 /KeepSidian/{now.year}/{note.month}-{note.day} 或 /path/to/daily notes

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Filename pattern for imported notes. Variables: {title}, {now.*} or {note.*} for date, time, year, month, day, quarter. Examples: {title}-{now.date} OR {title}-{note.year}
ast.target: 导入笔记的文件名模式。变量：{title}、{now.*} 或 {note.*} 用于日期、时间、年、月、日、季度。示例：{title}-{now.date} 或 {title}-{note.year}

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: KeepSidian provides two wizards to help retrieve your token. Each one walks you through the retrieval process using a different browser automation tool.This first option uses playwright from Microsoft. You can also retrieve your token manually using the "GitHub KIM instructions" further down below.
ast.target: KeepSidian 提供两个向导来帮助您获取令牌。每个向导都使用不同的浏览器自动化工具引导您完成检索过程。第一个选项使用 Microsoft 的 Playwright。您也可以使用下方的“GitHub KIM 说明”手动检索令牌。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This second option uses puppeteer, a browser automation tool from Google. You can also retrieve your token manually using the "GitHub KIM instructions" below.
ast.target: 第二个选项使用 Google 的浏览器自动化工具 Puppeteer。您也可以使用下方的“GitHub KIM 说明”手动检索令牌。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Prefer manual steps? Click the button to follow the GitHub KIM instructions, and paste the token into the "sync token" field above.
ast.target: 偏好手动步骤？点击按钮以遵循 GitHub KIM 说明，并将令牌粘贴到上方的“同步令牌”字段中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Log retrieval steps to the console.
ast.target: 将检索步骤记录到控制台。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Mobile: use a desktop-synced token or the GitHub KIM instructions below.
ast.target: 移动端：使用桌面端同步的令牌或下方的 GitHub KIM 说明。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how KeepSidian opens the Google login flow on desktop. The web viewer opens a separate tab.
ast.target: 选择 KeepSidian 在桌面端打开 Google 登录流程的方式。网页查看器会打开一个单独的标签页。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Desktop only: OAuth flow selection is disabled on mobile.
ast.target: 仅限桌面端：移动端上 OAuth 流程选择已禁用。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 仅包含包含以下内容的笔记

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 排除包含以下内容的笔记

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Instance method `debug.destroy()` is deprecated and no longer does anything. It will be removed in the next major version of `debug`.
ast.target: 实例方法 `debug.destroy()` 已弃用且不再执行任何操作。它将在 `debug` 的下一个主要版本中被移除。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: WARNING: running on unsupported windows version!
ast.target: 警告：正在不受支持的 Windows 版本上运行！

ast.name: warn
ast.source: these parameters are deprecated, see docs for addKeyword
ast.target: 这些参数已弃用，请参阅 addKeyword 的文档

ast.name: warn
ast.source: keywords option as map is deprecated, pass array
ast.target: keywords 选项作为 map 已弃用，请传递数组

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Warning: OpenAI may not support records in schemas! Try an array of key-value pairs instead.
ast.target: 警告：OpenAI 可能不支持模式中的记录！请尝试改用键值对数组。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Warning: OpenAI may not support schemas with unions as roots! Try wrapping it in an object property.
ast.target: 警告：OpenAI 可能不支持以联合类型为根的模式！请尝试将其包装在对象属性中。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Chrome DevTools Protocol (CDP) support for Firefox is deprecated in Puppeteer and it will be eventually removed. Use WebDriver BiDi instead (see https://pptr.dev/webdriver-bidi#get-started).
ast.target: Puppeteer 中对 Firefox 的 Chrome DevTools Protocol (CDP) 支持已弃用，并将最终被移除。请改用 WebDriver BiDi（参见 https://pptr.dev/webdriver-bidi#get-started）。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to check subscription status. Please try again later.
ast.target: 检查订阅状态失败。请稍后重试。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: KeepSidian: failed to write sync log.

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 已导入 Google Keep 笔记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please enter a valid email address before retrieving the token.
ast.target: 请在获取令牌前输入有效的电子邮箱地址。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Token retrieval wizard is only available on desktop. Paste a token instead.
ast.target: 令牌检索向导仅在桌面端可用。请改为粘贴令牌。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please enter a valid email address before launching browser automation.
ast.target: 请在启动浏览器自动化前输入有效的电子邮箱地址。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Browser automation is only available on desktop.
ast.target: 浏览器自动化仅在桌面端可用。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No Google Keep notes to push.
ast.target: 没有要推送的 Google Keep 笔记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 已推送 Google Keep 笔记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: KeepSidian: unable to open sync log.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: KeepSidian: failed to open sync log.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: KeepSidian: please enter your Google account email in the settings before syncing.
ast.target: KeepSidian：请在同步前在设置中输入您的 Google 账户电子邮箱。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: KeepSidian: please add your Google Keep token in the settings before syncing.
ast.target: KeepSidian：请在同步前在设置中添加您的 Google Keep 令牌。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: KeepSidian uploads & two-way sync are locked until prerequisites are met.
ast.target: KeepSidian 上传和双向同步功能在满足前提条件前已锁定。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Platform that the binary needs to be compatible with.
ast.target: 二进制文件需要兼容的平台。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Path to the root folder for the browser downloads and installation. The installation folder structure is compatible with the cache structure used by Puppeteer.
ast.target: 浏览器下载和安装的根文件夹路径。安装文件夹结构与 Puppeteer 使用的缓存结构兼容。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Search for a browser installed on the system instead of the cache folder.
ast.target: 搜索系统上已安装的浏览器，而不是缓存文件夹。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Path to the root folder for the browser downloads and installation. If a relative path is provided, it will be resolved relative to the current working directory. The installation folder structure is compatible with the cache structure used by Puppeteer.
ast.target: 浏览器下载和安装的根文件夹路径。如果提供相对路径，它将相对于当前工作目录解析。安装文件夹结构与 Puppeteer 使用的缓存结构兼容。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Whether to attempt installing system dependencies (only supported on Linux, requires root privileges).
ast.target: 是否尝试安装系统依赖项（仅在 Linux 上受支持，需要 root 权限）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Format to use for the output. Supported placeholders: {{browser}}, {{buildId}}, {{path}}, {{platform}}
ast.target: 输出使用的格式。支持的占位符：{{browser}}、{{buildId}}、{{path}}、{{platform}}

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Forwards the browser's process stdout and stderr
ast.target: 转发浏览器进程的 stdout 和 stderr

ast.name: description
ast.target: 从 .env 文件加载环境变量

ast.name: description
ast.source: A high-level API to automate web browsers
ast.target: 用于自动化 Web 浏览器的高级 API

ast.name: description
ast.source: Meta-schema for $data reference (JSON AnySchema extension proposal)
ast.target: 用于 $data 引用的元模式（JSON AnySchema 扩展提案）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whether the task is complete. If false, agentic loop will continue to perform the task.
ast.target: 任务是否完成。如果为 false，智能体循环将继续执行任务。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Report the result of the task.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Call this when you believe that you can't perform the action because something is wrong with the page. The reason will be reported to the user.
ast.target: 当您认为无法执行操作，因为页面出现问题时调用此方法。原因将报告给用户。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Capture accessibility snapshot of the current page, this is better than screenshot
ast.target: 捕获当前页面的可访问性快照，这比截图更好

ast.name: description
ast.source: Perform click on a web page

ast.name: description
ast.source: Perform drag and drop between two elements
ast.target: 在两个元素之间执行拖放操作

ast.name: description
ast.target: 悬停在页面上的元素上

ast.name: description
ast.source: Select an option in a dropdown
ast.target: 在下拉菜单中选择一个选项

ast.name: description
ast.source: Press a key on the keyboard

ast.name: description
ast.target: 在可编辑元素中输入文本

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fill multiple form fields. Always use this tool when you can fill more than one field at a time.
ast.target: 填写多个表单字段。当您可以同时填写多个字段时，请始终使用此工具。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Set the checked state of a checkbox
ast.target: 设置复选框的选中状态

ast.name: description
ast.source: Expect element is visible on the page
ast.target: 期望元素在页面上可见

ast.name: description
ast.source: Expect list is visible on the page, ensures items are present in the element in the exact order
ast.target: 期望列表在页面上可见，确保元素中的项目按精确顺序呈现

ast.name: description
ast.source: Expect the page URL to match the expected value. Either provide a url string or a regex pattern.
ast.target: 期望页面URL与预期值匹配。请提供URL字符串或正则表达式模式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Expect the page title to match the expected value.
ast.target: 期望页面标题与预期值匹配。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Which browser to install <browser>[@<buildId|latest>]. `latest` will try to find the latest available build. `buildId` is a browser-specific identifier such as a version or a revision.
ast.target: 要安装的浏览器 <browser>[@<buildId|latest>]。`latest` 将尝试查找最新的可用版本。`buildId` 是特定于浏览器的标识符，例如版本号或修订号。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A high-level API to control headless Chrome over the DevTools Protocol
ast.target: 一个用于通过DevTools协议控制无头Chrome的高级API

ast.name: error
ast.source: failed to parse address with port
ast.target: 解析带端口的地址失败

ast.name: error
ast.source: failed to parse address from URL

ast.target: 执行步骤失败，已达到最大尝试次数

ast.source: Specified archive does not have a .har file
ast.target: 指定的存档中没有.har文件

ast.target: 请选择一个自定义日期。

ast.target: 请选择一个有效的自定义日期。

ast.target: 自定义日期必须是过去的日期。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Tried to pop an empty stack

ast.name: message
ast.source: Sequence items should be strings or maps
ast.target: 序列项应为字符串或映射

ast.name: message
ast.source: Text value should be a string

ast.name: message
ast.source: Property value should be a string

ast.name: message
ast.source: Node value should be a string or a sequence
ast.target: 节点值应为字符串或序列

ast.name: message
ast.source: Map values should be strings or sequences
ast.target: 映射值应为字符串或序列

ast.name: message
ast.source: Aria snapshot must be a YAML sequence, elements starting with " -"
ast.target: Aria快照必须是YAML序列，元素以 \" -\" 开头

ast.name: message
ast.source: must be equal to one of the allowed values

ast.source: must match a schema in anyOf
ast.target: 必须匹配anyOf中的某个模式

ast.name: message

ast.target: URL 不能使用 javascript:、data: 或 vbscript: 方案

ast.name: message
ast.source: Internal error: har was not opened

ast.name: message
ast.source: Waiting for the login page to load.

ast.name: message
ast.source: Google is blocking automated or embedded logins here. Try the system browser option or a different account.
ast.target: Google 正在阻止此处的自动化或嵌入式登录。请尝试系统浏览器选项或使用其他账户。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Pick the Google account you want to use.
ast.target: 选择您要使用的 Google 账户。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Google needs extra verification. Pick one of the methods shown.
ast.target: Google 需要额外验证。选择显示的方法之一。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Enter the code sent to your phone.
ast.target: 输入发送到您手机的验证码。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Open your authenticator app and enter the code.
ast.target: 打开您的身份验证器应用并输入验证码。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Check your phone and approve the sign-in prompt.
ast.target: 检查您的手机并批准登录提示。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Touch your security key to continue.
ast.target: 触摸您的安全密钥以继续。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Use a backup code or choose another verification method.
ast.target: 使用备用验证码或选择其他验证方法。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Google needs a CAPTCHA. Complete the challenge to continue.
ast.target: Google 需要验证码。完成挑战以继续。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Follow the on-screen verification steps to continue.
ast.target: 按照屏幕上的验证步骤继续。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Review the consent screen and continue.

ast.name: message
ast.source: Follow the Google prompts until the login completes.
ast.target: 按照 Google 的提示操作，直到登录完成。

ast.name: message
ast.source: KeepSidian can now exchange your token.
ast.target: KeepSidian 现在可以交换您的令牌。

ast.name: message
ast.source: The KeepSidian server could not be reached. Check your connection or make sure the sync server is running, then try again.
ast.target: 无法连接到 KeepSidian 服务器。请检查您的连接或确保同步服务器正在运行，然后重试。
